doc_title: Age Discrimination in Employment Act — EEOC Compliance Manual
label: partial
reason: The document accurately reflects EEOC policy and ADEA law, but it misrepresents the official structure and naming conventions of the EEOC Compliance Manual.
response_turn1:
LABEL: PARTIAL
CONFIDENCE: 90
REASON: The document correctly summarizes ADEA principles, but the EEOC Compliance Manual is structured into numbered sections that do not correspond to an official "Section 8: Age Discrimination" issued in 2018.
